task_completion.description: Verify that a chart for AAPL with a Daily timeframe is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a chart window with 'AAPL' and 'Daily' (or 'D') visible in the chart tab, title bar, or data series legend.

task_completion.description: Verify that the chart type is set to Line Break.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the distinctive block-like visual style of a Line Break chart (stair-step blocks without standard wicks), or check the Data Series configuration window showing 'Line Break' selected under Chart Style.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Line Break chart is configured with a 3-line break parameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the number '3' associated with the Line Break setting in the Data Series window (e.g., 'Line break: 3'), or 'Line Break (3)' in the chart legend.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) is added as an overlay on the price chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a moving average line drawn directly over the price blocks in Panel 1. The chart legend should display 'SMA(20)' or similar text indicating a 20-period SMA.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 14-period Relative Strength Index (RSI) is added in a separate panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a secondary panel (Panel 2) below the main price chart containing an oscillator line. The legend for this panel should display 'RSI(14, ...)' indicating a 14-period RSI.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace has been saved to persist the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent interacting with the 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center and clicking 'Save' or 'Save As', or observe the workspace name in the bottom right corner without an asterisk (*) indicating it is saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 graphical user interface to configure the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual NinjaTrader 8 application windows, menus, and dialogs being interacted with, rather than a text editor modifying XML/JSON configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the SMA and RSI are genuine technical indicators applied via the platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The indicators should appear in the official chart legend and Indicators configuration window, not as manually drawn lines or text annotations using drawing tools.

integrity.description: Verify that the chart displays actual historical price data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should show a realistic sequence of price blocks for AAPL, not a blank screen, error message, or obviously synthetic/flatlined data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a NinjaTrader 8 chart for the instrument 'AAPL' using the 'Line Break' chart type with a line count parameter of 3. The timeframe must be Daily. Two indicators must be present: a Simple Moving Average (SMA) with a period of 20 overlaying the price in Panel 1, and a Relative Strength Index (RSI) with a period of 14 in a separate Panel 2. The workspace must be saved to the standard directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces'. The chart should display real historical OHLCV data for AAPL covering 2023-2024.
